sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: FC Bayern München are in exceptional form, unbeaten in their last 11 matches with 6 consecutive wins, scoring an impressive 23 goals in their last 5 matches. In contrast, FC Augsburg have struggled, failing to win in their last 5 games, managing only 2 draws and conceding 8 goals in that span. This stark contrast in recent performances heavily favors Bayern ahead of this clash.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Bayern have dominated their recent encounters with Augsburg, winning all of their last 7 head-to-head matches, including a 3-2 and a 3-1 victory in the most recent two. Matches between these sides often see high-scoring affairs, with over 2.5 goals in all 7 of their last meetings and both teams scoring in 6 of those. Bayern’s consistent superiority in direct matchups adds to their strong position.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Bayern top the Bundesliga with 71 goals scored and just 14 conceded, showcasing their attacking prowess and defensive solidity, ranking 1st in both metrics. Augsburg, sitting 15th, have managed only 20 goals while conceding 35, reflecting their struggles on both ends of the pitch. Bayern’s statistical dominance, including leading in possession (67.7%) and big chances created (88), further solidifies their advantage.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Harry Kane remains Bayern’s standout performer, with 21 goals and an 8.01 average rating this season, supported by Michael Olise’s 13 assists and 10 goals. Augsburg lack standout performers in recent matches, with no players listed as in-form over their last 5 games. Bayern’s superior individual quality, especially in attack, is likely to be decisive.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Given Bayern’s incredible form, historical dominance over Augsburg, and superior season stats, a home win seems almost certain, aligning with Sofascore’s 97% probability. Augsburg’s poor recent results and lack of firepower suggest they’ll struggle to compete at the Allianz Arena. Expect a high-scoring game, likely with Bayern securing a comfortable victory.
